headline: Charles Schwab to Launch Spot Bitcoin and Ether Trading in 2026
summary: Charles Schwab (SCHW) plans to launch direct spot Bitcoin and Ethereum trading in the first half of 2026, targeting a limited rollout starting in Q2.

headline: Jefferies Is Betting on Robinhood to Become a ‘Super App.’ Is That Possible in the Age of AI?
summary: Jefferies initiated coverage of Robinhood with a Buy rating and says it appears clear that the company is becoming a financial super app.

headline: Schwab Trading Activity Index™: STAX Score Sees Steepest Monthly Drop Since May 2025
summary: WESTLAKE, Texas, April 06, 2026--The Schwab Trading Activity Index™ (STAX) decreased to 56.04 in March, down from its score of 57.32 in February. The only index of its kind, the STAX is a proprietary, behavior-based index that analyzes retail investor stock positions and trading activity from Schwab’s millions of client accounts to illuminate what investors were actually doing and how they were positioned in the markets each month.

headline: Are You 'Upper Class' Or Just Upper Middle? Here Are The Net Worth Thresholds That Separate The Wealthy From Everyone Else
summary: Comparison might steal joy, but it also pays the bills when it comes to reality checks. Somewhere between a paid-off car and a fully funded brokerage account sits a question a lot of households quietly ask: is this success, or just stability with better branding? The answer gets murky fast. A six-figure salary used to feel like a golden ticket. Now it can feel like a decent seat with a clear view of people playing in a different league. headline: Charles Schwab Adds Bitcoin and Ethereum Crypto Trading to Brokerage Platform

headline: AI may replace your financial advisor, MIT professor says — but there's one big hurdle
summary: Artificial intelligence has gotten sophisticated with respect to financial advice. But it doesn't have a legal obligation to put clients first.
